response.global_summary: The video features a live performance by Hakui Koyori, beginning with dialogue and followed by a medley performance featuring multiple songs including "Motteke! Sailor Fuku" and "Ai♡Scream!".

scenes.description: A live performance by Hakui Koyori, with on-screen text indicating the song 'Motteke! Sailor Fuku'. The song is performed by Hakui Koyori and others.
